confirmed_issues.description: 8 Prettier formatting errors in 3 source files (-admin.test.tsx, admin.tsx, sniper.ts). ESLint reported 8 fixable errors.
confirmed_issues.root_cause: Prettier formatting drift from recent Phase 2/3 development work (post-2026-05-22 commits). Trailing commas and line-break rules not applied consistently.
confirmed_issues.proposed_fix: Run eslint --fix on the three affected files (formatting-only, no logic change)

confirmed_issues.description: test-phase2-trade-telemetry.php fails on streak.current_streak_days assertion. Pre-existing failure noted in 2026-05-22 parity audit.
confirmed_issues.root_cause: The streak calculator relies on CALENDAR_DAY_WITH_ANY_COMPLETED_ENGINE_RUN. The test mock inserts an engine run 5 seconds in the past but the streak computation path may not count it as 'today' due to how the mock DB emulates UTC date boundaries. This is outside the Phase 3 MT5 payload seam.
confirmed_issues.proposed_fix: Document as pre-existing — does not affect production streak logic which uses real DB timestamps. A dedicated fix should be scoped as a separate test-harness task.
